heading: Full Stack Engineer (PHP/Laravel)
paragraphs: I am a Full Stack Engineer from Egypt with 5+ years of experience building scalable SaaS, e-commerce, and enterprise platforms.
My work focuses on high-performance backend systems, RESTful APIs, and AI-driven automation across E-commerce, Logistics, CRM, HRM, WMS, EdTech, and multi-tenant architectures.

I design and build production-grade systems with real-time features, third-party integrations, and clean, scalable architecture, while delivering seamless frontend experiences using React.js and Vue.js.
